title: Strings
tmdbOverview: María's routine at school is altered by the arrival of a very special child. Soon, they become close friends.
synopsis: Strings is a 2013 animation, drama and family film from Spain. It holds a solid 7.9 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2010s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a PG certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
